requirements for running Windows XP, and booting from removable media. We strongly recommend more RAM and diskspace in order to run Windows comfortably. Desktops 233Mhz or faster Pentium II/Celeron CPU. 64MB or more RAM. 14" or larger monitor. One

CPU. 64MB or more RAM. 14" or larger monitor. One or more 2GB or larger internal disk. 10/100Mb ethernet device (any manufacturer). Keyboard and mouse (any kind). Internal CD or DVD drive (any speed). Internal floppy drive. UC Property tag (as necess
